'''竏嗹-f-s''' ('''kawafas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunosort|immunosort]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunosort|immunosort]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗹-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| kawafas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwafas|thiwafas]] || [[word:jiwafas|jiwafas]] || [[word:shiwafas|shiwafas]] || [[word:kiwafas|kiwafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwafas|thuthuwafas]] || [[word:jujuwafas|jujuwafas]] || [[word:shushuwafas|shushuwafas]] || [[word:kukuwafas|kukuwafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwafas|thuwafas]] || [[word:juwafas|juwafas]] || [[word:shuwafas|shuwafas]] || [[word:kuwafas|kuwafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwafas|thuwafas]] || [[word:juwafas|juwafas]] || [[word:shuwafas|shuwafas]] || [[word:kuwafas|kuwafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewafas|thewafas]] || [[word:jewafas|jewafas]] || [[word:shewafas|shewafas]] || [[word:kewafas|kewafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowafas|thothowafas]] || [[word:jojowafas|jojowafas]] || [[word:shoshowafas|shoshowafas]] || [[word:kokowafas|kokowafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowafas|thowafas]] || [[word:jowafas|jowafas]] || [[word:showafas|showafas]] || [[word:kowafas|kowafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowafas|thowafas]] || [[word:jowafas|jowafas]] || [[word:showafas|showafas]] || [[word:kowafas|kowafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦwafas|thﾃｦwafas]] || [[word:jﾃｦwafas|jﾃｦwafas]] || [[word:shﾃｦwafas|shﾃｦwafas]] || [[word:kﾃｦwafas|kﾃｦwafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawafas|thathawafas]] || [[word:jajawafas|jajawafas]] || [[word:shashawafas|shashawafas]] || [[word:kakawafas|kakawafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawafas|thawafas]] || [[word:jawafas|jawafas]] || [[word:shawafas|shawafas]] || [[word:kawafas|kawafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawafas|thawafas]] || [[word:jawafas|jawafas]] || [[word:shawafas|shawafas]] || [[word:kawafas|kawafas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawafas|shawafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawafas|goshawafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawafas|gokishawafas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawafasnﾃｼ|shawafasnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawafasnknﾃｼ|goshawafasnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafasnﾃｼ|gokishawafasnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawafashﾃｫ|shawafashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawafasnkshﾃｫ|goshawafasnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawafashﾃｫ|gokishawafashﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafasro|shawafasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafasnkro|goshawafasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafasro|gokishawafasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafasmu|shawafasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafasnkmu|goshawafasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafasmu|gokishawafasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawafasher|shawafasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawafasnksher|goshawafasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawafasher|gokishawafasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawafasng|shawafasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawafasnkng|goshawafasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawafasng|gokishawafasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawafasya|shawafasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawafasnkya|goshawafasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawafasya|gokishawafasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawafasyam|shawafasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawafasnkyam|goshawafasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawafasyam|gokishawafasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafasnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shawafasnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafasnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshawafasnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafasnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishawafasnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafasnﾃｼro|shawafasnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafasnknﾃｼro|goshawafasnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafasnﾃｼro|gokishawafasnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafasnﾃｼmu|shawafasnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafasnknﾃｼmu|goshawafasnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafasnﾃｼmu|gokishawafasnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafashﾃｫnﾃｼ|shawafashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafasnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshawafasnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafashﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishawafashﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafashﾃｫro|shawafashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafasnkshﾃｫro|goshawafasnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafashﾃｫro|gokishawafashﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafashﾃｫmu|shawafashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafasnkshﾃｫmu|goshawafasnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafashﾃｫmu|gokishawafashﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafasronﾃｼ|shawafasronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafasnkronﾃｼ|goshawafasnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafasronﾃｼ|gokishawafasronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafasroshﾃｫ|shawafasroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafasnkroshﾃｫ|goshawafasnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafasroshﾃｫ|gokishawafasroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafasromu|shawafasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafasnkromu|goshawafasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafasromu|gokishawafasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafasmunﾃｼ|shawafasmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafasnkmunﾃｼ|goshawafasnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafasmunﾃｼ|gokishawafasmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafasmushﾃｫ|shawafasmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafasnkmushﾃｫ|goshawafasnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafasmushﾃｫ|gokishawafasmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafasmuro|shawafasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafasnkmuro|goshawafasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafasmuro|gokishawafasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|59e8839}}
